subject: An ornate mechanical insect-like construct with a gold filigree body, a large teal glass-sphere core, and long trailing teal tendril filaments
description: A mechanical insect or drone-like construct dominates the composition, rendered in warm gold filigree with elaborate decorative scrollwork and a large central teal-tinted glass or crystal sphere as its body core. Long curving teal-green tendril filaments stream outward from its body like wings or sensory organs, creating a sense of motion and elegance. The background is a warm hazy amber-grey suggesting an urban or industrial skyline at distance. The craft aesthetic is ornate steampunk or aetherpunk — handmade luxury rather than mass-produced.
foreground: Gold filigree mechanical insect body with teal glass sphere core, teal tendril filaments streaming outward
background: Warm hazy amber-grey urban or industrial atmosphere at distance
emotion: n/a — no figure; the object conveys elegance and engineered precision
